data.content: Planning complete for foolery-5edd. Implement docs/APPROVALS.md plus scripts/test-cli-approvals-manual.{sh,mjs}; keep real CLI/config runs manual-only and out of default tests. The harness should back up ~/.config/foolery/settings.toml and OpenCode config when touched, force one provider at a time, start sessions via POST /api/terminal, watch SSE for FOOLERY APPROVAL REQUIRED, approve the first request from Foolery, then prove continuation with a provider-specific token marker and file. Known blockers must be precise: Codex approvalPolicy/responder, Claude non-bypass launch/responder, OpenCode permission.asked extraction and /permissions responder.
